prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Smart Switch (TYZGTH1CH-D1RF)**
   - **New Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_xxxxx`
   - **Existing Fingerprints:** `_TZ3218_7fiyo3kv` (drivers: `switch_temp_sensor`)
   - **Issue Link:** [Device Request - smart switch](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1329) (Open)

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **Plug Energy Monitor**
  - Fingerprints:
    - `_TZ3210_w0qqde0g` (drivers: `plug_energy_monitor`)
    - `_TZ3210_xzhnra8x` (drivers: `plug_energy_monitor`)
    - `_TZ3000_w0qqde0g` (drivers: `plug_energy_monitor`)
    - `_TZ3000_gjnozsaz` (drivers: `button_emergency_sos`, `plug_energy_monitor`)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the current analysis.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **PR #45** - [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)
   - **User:** vl14-dev
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **Status:** Merged

2. **PR #46** - [Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)
   - **User:** vl14-dev
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **Status:** Closed, not merged

3. **PR #1253** - [Added 3 new devices](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)
   - **User:** Peter-Celica
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
   - **Status:** Open

4. **PR #1219** - [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)
   - **User:** Melectro1
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`
   - **Status:** Open

5. **PR #1218** - [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)
   - **User:** Melectro1
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_dapwryy7`
   - **Status:** Open

6. **PR #1195** - [Add "_TZE204_bjzrowv2" - Update app.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)
   - **User:** YuriEstevan
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`
   - **Status:** Open

7. **PR #1210** - [Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan drivers](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1210)
   - **User:** TKGHill
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_lawxy9e2`, `_TZE204_nklqjk62`
   - **Status:** Open

8. **PR #1292** - [Added radar&illuminance sensor](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1292)
   - **User:** WJGvdVelden
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_y8jijhba`
   - **Status:** Open

## Conclusion
The current GitHub activity indicates ongoing development and support for various Tuya Zigbee devices, with several new requests and PRs aimed at enhancing device compatibility. Community contributions remain vital for expanding the range of supported devices.
